description: Glob-class-completeness canary — verifies the `Templates*` pattern catches multiple numeric-suffix variants (`Templates2/`, `Templates99/`) not just the literal `Templates1/`. Two separate vendor-template directories each carry a literal JWT-format token. Post-v0.15.4 picomatch-glob-support plus `Templates*` in DEFAULT_IGNORE must cause walkFiles to skip BOTH directories. If Option-A (exact-match-only) had been chosen, this canary would RED because only literal `Templates1` would have been added. The FP-assertion: zero jwt-detector findings across both subdirs.
